props.ChoiceText: You survived the lingering fever that follows bad camps, old wounds, and a body already worn too hard.
props.ChoiceBio: Fever after the campaign taught you that survival does not end when the battle does.

0.TransitionText: Because camp fever taught you that sickness kills more soldiers than courage ever saves, surviving it only made you more of a veteran.
0.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Veteran, but you may remain on your current path instead.

1.TransitionText: Because camp fever taught you that sickness kills more soldiers than courage ever saves, survival did not save you from hardship.

2.TransitionText: Because camp fever taught you that sickness kills more soldiers than courage ever saves, a body that had survived too much was easy to hire again.
2.TransitionPrompt: This could carry you into Mercenary, but you may remain on your current path instead.
